justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering options, which led to a very long and unproductive conversation.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation was stuck in a loop, with the agent repeatedly asking the user to provide new times after each unavailability response, leading to 12 turns without any progress.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation was frustrating and felt stuck in a loop, with the agent repeatedly asking for new times without offering proactive alternatives, which would make a customer seriously consider hanging up.

judge_scores.overall_notes: The agent was unable to book an appointment and did not proactively offer alternative times or days, instead repeatedly asking the user to provide new options, which led to a very long and unproductive conversation.
